justification: High-skilled emigration rate is a specific outflow component of the broader human-capital-stock dynamics; refines the human-capital concept by isolating the skilled-emigration channel.
Remittances are one financing mechanism that shifts the human-capital stock via household education investment.
Return migration is the subset of diaspora dynamics involving migrants moving back to origin; structurally distinct from outbound diaspora persistence.
Innovation output is a specific dimension of firm dynamics — patent and publication production refines the broader firm-creation/productivity concept.
Gender norms (especially female political participation and decision-making) are one substantive component of broader democratic-quality measures.
Population health (especially infant mortality, child outcomes) feeds into long-run human-capital formation but is conceptually distinct from labor-market skill stocks.
